title: Luca's First Garden Day
synopsis: Little Luca feels scared on his first day helping in the school garden, but with the help of his kind teacher and new friends, he discovers the joy of planting seeds and watching them grow, transforming his fear into excitement and pride.

pages.text: Luca held his mama's hand tight. Today was his first day in the school garden! His tummy felt funny and scared. "What if I don't know how to grow plants?" he whispered.

illustration.description: A small Latino boy with curly dark hair wearing a bright yellow t-shirt and blue overalls, holding his mother's hand outside a colorful preschool with a garden visible in the background. Luca looks nervous with wide eyes, while his mama, a woman with long dark hair in a pink cardigan, smiles encouragingly. The scene shows a sunny morning with green plants and wooden garden beds visible.
illustration.alt: Luca nervously holding his mother's hand outside the school garden

pages.text: Miss Chen smiled at Luca. "Don't worry," she said in her gentle voice. "Everyone learns together here." Luca saw other children playing in the dirt. Maya had soil on her cheeks and looked so happy!

illustration.description: A kind Asian teacher with short black hair wearing a green apron over a purple shirt, kneeling down to Luca's eye level with a warm smile. Behind them, diverse children are playing in the garden - a Black girl with braided hair (Maya) has dirt smudges on her face and is laughing, while other children of various ethnicities dig in garden beds. Bright sunflowers and tomato plants grow in the background.
illustration.alt: Miss Chen welcoming Luca while other children happily garden

pages.text: "I'm scared," Luca told Maya. She gave him a little seed. "Don't be scared! Seeds are brave. They grow in the dark earth and reach for the sun!" Luca felt a little braver holding the tiny seed.

illustration.description: Maya, a cheerful Black girl with colorful hair ties in her braids, wearing a red dress, placing a small brown seed in Luca's open palm. Both children are sitting cross-legged on the grass near garden beds filled with rich, dark soil. Luca's expression is changing from worried to curious as he examines the seed. Bright green seedlings peek up from nearby garden rows.
illustration.alt: Maya sharing a seed with Luca, helping him feel braver

pages.text: Luca dug a little hole with his fingers. The soil felt cool and soft. He placed his seed inside and covered it gently. "Grow big and strong!" he whispered. Now Luca felt proud and excited!

illustration.description: Luca kneeling in the garden with dirt-covered hands, carefully placing a seed in a small hole he dug in the rich brown soil. His face shows concentration and joy, with a big smile. Watering cans, small shovels, and colorful plant markers are scattered around. The garden bed is full of neat rows where other seeds have been planted, with tiny green shoots beginning to emerge.
illustration.alt: Luca proudly planting his seed in the school garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Luca feel when he first got to the garden?
questions.explanation: Luca felt scared because it was his first day in the school garden and he didn't know how to grow plants.

questions.question: Who helped Luca feel braver?
questions.explanation: Maya helped Luca feel braver by giving him a seed and telling him that seeds are brave.

questions.question: What did Luca do with his seed?
questions.explanation: Luca dug a hole, placed his seed inside, and covered it gently to plant it.

questions.question: How did Luca feel at the end?
questions.explanation: After planting his seed, Luca felt proud and excited about what he had accomplished.

pages.text: Luca felt _____ on his first day in the school garden.
Maya gave Luca a little _____ to plant.
After planting his seed, Luca felt _____ and excited.
